# MDE v1.6.6

## Features

- Added task-level `executionRoot` support for Automation Flow discovery, matching, projection, shared task types, desktop IPC, runtime, store, prompt metadata, adapter startup, runtime bridge authorization, and run locking.
- Automation Center now displays the effective execution root for task runs and separates same task identities by root-scoped task keys.
- Task surfaces now expose per-run execution records with report references and summaries, including code-review executor results.

## Bug Fixes

- Removed the unsafe runtime fallback from task `sourcePath` to execution working directory; `sourcePath` is now evidence-only and cannot authorize writes outside the effective root.
- Invalid, missing, relative, or unusable task-level execution roots now produce persistent blocking diagnostics instead of silently starting from another root.
- Run notification, history, and resume flows now use canonical effective roots so cross-repository tasks do not collide with workspace-local tasks or legacy runs.

## Breaking Changes

- None.

## Maintenance

- Updated release metadata to `1.6.6` for the root workspace, desktop app, and changed private `@mde/automation-flow` package.
- Added focused unit and integration coverage for execution-root preservation, root validation, runtime coordination, store persistence, bridge authorization, notifications, projection, and renderer view-model behavior.
- Added Automation Center E2E coverage for custom execution roots and workspace-default task runs.

## Documentation/User Manual

- Updated the Chinese Automation Center manual to describe effective execution roots and per-run report details.
- Updated the component naming reference for the new Automation Center execution-root and report surfaces.
- `pnpm run docs:build` is required for this release because `user-manual/` changed.

## Verification

- Release verification for `v1.6.6`:
  - `pnpm --filter @mde/automation-flow test`
  - `pnpm --filter @mde/automation-flow typecheck`
  - `pnpm --filter @mde/desktop typecheck`
  - `pnpm --filter @mde/desktop test`
  - `pnpm run lint`
  - `pnpm run typecheck`
  - `pnpm run build`
  - `pnpm run test:unit`
  - `pnpm run test:integration`
  - `pnpm run test:e2e`
  - `pnpm run docs:build`
  - `git diff --check`

## Artifacts

- GitHub Actions Release workflow publishes macOS DMG/ZIP artifacts and Windows NSIS installer artifacts for `v1.6.6`.
- macOS signing and notarization remain optional for the no-paid-account release path; unsigned macOS artifacts are expected when signing secrets are not configured.
